hero.title: Keybinds your fingers will thank you for
hero.subtitle: Paste the talent export string from the game — the optimizer reads your build, weighs every ability against real cast data, and solves the layout for your keyboard, mouse, and game mode.

examples.title: Or try a ready-made popular build:

input.importHint: Open the talent frame in game → share button → Copy Export String
input.targetBindsHint: Dedicated keys for target arena 1/2/3 — instant swap to the first/second/third enemy. On by default only in the Arena 1/2/3 scheme; with focus targeting most players swap with the mouse and redirect CC through focus macros.
input.racialsLabel: Active racials — they enter the layout too

results.editKeysHint: Click keys to exclude them from the layout or bring them back. Tab is excluded by default — it usually targets enemies. The layout re-solves automatically.

hover.reasonReactive: Reactive ability — demands a top-tier key with instant reach
hover.reasonPanic: Panic button — placed without a modifier for stress-proof access
hover.reasonFrequent: High cast frequency — deserves a comfortable key
hover.reasonSTier: S-tier key: minimal finger travel from movement keys
hover.reasonRotationOrder: Placed in rotation order — higher-priority abilities sit earlier in the row
hover.reasonFocusVariant: Focus macro variant — shares the base spell's key on another layer
hover.reasonArenaVariant: Arena target variant — clustered with its 1/2/3 siblings
hover.reasonSynergy: Placed near abilities it is often cast with

score.qualityHint: Sum over all binds: ability importance × key comfort, plus bonuses when related abilities sit next to each other
score.baselineHint: For comparison: abilities simply dealt onto the best keys in order, ignoring how they relate to each other
score.improvementHint: How much better the optimized layout is than the naive one
score.explainer: The optimizer searched tens of thousands of arrangements: frequent abilities got the most comfortable keys arranged in rotation order (higher priority — earlier in the 1-2-3-4-Q-E-R row), interrupts got instantly reachable ones, panic buttons avoid modifiers, and pairs like an interrupt and its focus variant landed on neighboring keys or layers of the same key.
score.categoriesHint: 100 — the most comfortable keys (right next to your WASD fingers), 0 — the farthest
score.warningRelaxed: Not enough top-tier keys for every reactive ability — the bar was relaxed to {value}

tree.title: Talent tree
tree.hint: Click a bind to see which talent granted it; click a node to find its bind. Click empty space to clear the selection.

export.cartHint: The downloaded addon bundles every layout below plus the variants of the current build. In game, /kbo opens the browser; when you switch specs the addon applies the matching layout automatically. Keys stay consistent: shared spells keep the binds from the layouts already in the addon.
export.macrosHint: Create these macros in game (Esc → Macros) and drag them onto the listed keys, or use the Lua addon tab to apply everything automatically.
export.luaHint: 1. Click "Download addon (.zip)" and extract it into World of Warcraft/_retail_/Interface/AddOns — you should get a KeybindOptimizer folder inside.  2. Fully restart the game (or /reload if it is running).  3. On the character-select screen open "AddOns" and tick "Load out of date AddOns" if KeybindOptimizer is marked outdated.  The addon ships every layout variant from this page: type /kbo in game to open the layout browser — preview each variant on a bar grid with real spell icons, pick one and hit Apply. Bars mirror your keyboard: the main bar is the number row 1–12, the next bar holds the base-layer letter keys, then one bar per modifier layer (Shift, Ctrl, Alt) with digits aligned to the same columns. It only touches spells and its own macros: mounts, toys, items, pets and your personal macros are kept — abilities are placed around them. Applying is idempotent: on login it verifies the bars and re-applies only if something drifted (toggle in settings). Druids and Rogues page the main bar in forms/stealth, so it is skipped for them by default. Works on any client language — abilities are resolved by ID. Commands: /kbo — layout browser, /kbo apply, /kbo force, /kbo check, /kbo profile N, /kbo bars, /kbo auto, /kbo colors, /kbo legend, /kbo mainbar, /kbo mouseover, /kbo clearmain.

addon.colorsTooltip: Color action buttons by the ability's category.
addon.legendTooltip: Show the draggable category color legend.
addon.mainbarTooltip: Place abilities on the main bar (slots 1-12) too. Off for Druids and Rogues by default — their main bar pages in forms and stealth.
addon.autoApplyTooltip: Re-apply automatically after login or /reload — only when the bars have drifted from the layout.
addon.mouseoverTooltip: Cast ally-targeted spells on the unit under your cursor via macros.
addon.specMismatch: This layout was built for another specialization
addon.msgBoundOnly: bound to keys but not placed on bars: %s
addon.msgIntact: layout already applied — nothing to do
addon.msgCombat: in combat — will apply after combat ends
addon.msgSpecSkip: layout is for another spec — /kbo force to apply anyway
addon.enableBarsHint: some abilities are on hidden bars — type /kbo bars, or enable them in Edit Mode
addon.msgBarsEnabled: action bars enabled — /reload if any are still hidden
addon.msgBarsManual: could not toggle bars automatically — enable them in Edit Mode (HUD)
addon.msgCleared: main action bar spells cleared (mounts, toys and macros kept)
addon.msgCheckOk: layout matches the bars and bindings
addon.msgSpecAdapted: no exact layout for this spec — applied the class-wide binds; generate a full one on the site
addon.msgAccountBinds: note: your key bindings are account-wide — enable character-specific bindings if your other characters use different layouts
addon.help: /kbo — layout browser, /kbo apply — apply, /kbo force — force apply, /kbo check — verify, /kbo import — import a layout string, /kbo profile N — pick layout, /kbo bars — show hidden bars, /kbo auto — login auto-apply, /kbo colors, /kbo legend, /kbo mainbar, /kbo mouseover, /kbo clearmain
addon.importTitle: Import a layout from the site
addon.importHint: Paste the import string (starts with !KBO1!) and press Import — no addon re-download needed.
addon.msgImported: layouts imported: %d — select one and press Apply
addon.importErrFormat: import string is corrupted or has an unsupported format
addon.importErrChecksum: import string is incomplete — copy it fully and paste again
addon.importErrClient: this game client does not support import strings (C_EncodingUtil missing)

export.importHint: In game: /kbo → “Import layout…” (or /kbo import), paste the string — the addon applies everything without re-downloading.

bars.hiddenHint: Hidden bars can be enabled with /kbo bars or in Edit Mode.
